jobs.title: Senior Frontend Developer
jobs.description: We are seeking a talented Senior Frontend Developer skilled in modern React.js to join our core product team. You will lead UI component architecture, collaborate closely with design systems, and optimize page rendering performance.
reqs: Expert knowledge of CSS/CSS-in-JS and fluid layouts
Experience building responsive, animations-heavy landing pages

jobs.title: UI/UX Product Designer
jobs.description: Join our studio to build responsive dashboards, portal designs, and interactive layouts. You will build user flows, UI mockups, and work closely with React engineers to implement pixel-perfect user experiences.
reqs: Strong portfolio demonstrating responsive design & glassmorphism layouts
Proficiency with Figma and design system libraries
Basic understanding of CSS grids and flexbox layouts
